findings.location: s3 — キャッシュを使用するクラスにBasicStaticDataCacheを設定する
findings.description: The Java code example for SampleService is omitted. The source provides a concrete code block showing StaticDataCache<Integer> as the field type and getValue(n) as the access method. This demonstrates the actual API usage pattern for consumers of the cache.

The hints for s3 are missing 'loadAll' and 'getValue', which appear as the first-column keys in the StaticDataLoader method implementation table in s3 content. These are the primary method names users would search for when implementing StaticDataLoader.
findings.source_evidence: Source table rows: ':loadAll:' and ':getValue:' in the StaticDataLoader implementation rules section
